content:
We are now moving to Phase 2.

IMPORTANT:
Do NOT rebuild the app.
Do NOT modify UI or navigation.
Do NOT change styling or theme.
Do NOT regenerate any screens.

Work ONLY on backend integration and data wiring.

Goal:
Replace mock/local data with real Firebase integration.

Use Firebase ONLY (no Supabase).

Integrations required:
- Firebase Auth
- Firestore
- Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM)

Step 1: Firebase Setup (structure only, no credentials hardcoded)
Prepare the app to use:
- Firebase Auth (email/password)
- Firestore database
- FCM notifications

Create a clean service layer:
- /services/firebaseConfig.ts
- /services/authService.ts
- /services/firestoreService.ts
- /services/notificationService.ts

Use environment variables or config placeholders (NO real keys).

---

Step 2: Auth Integration
Replace mock AuthContext with Firebase Auth:
- login → signInWithEmailAndPassword
- register → createUserWithEmailAndPassword
- logout → signOut

After registration:
Create user document in Firestore:
collection: users
fields:
uid, nameAr, nameEn, email, phone, city, createdAt

Persist auth session properly.

---

Step 3: Firestore Data Wiring

Replace all mock data with Firestore reads/writes:

Collections:
- users
- equipment
- equipmentRequests
- equipmentRequests/{requestId}/messages
- ratings

Implement:

Equipment:
- fetch list
- fetch detail
- create equipment (provider)

Requests:
- create request
- update status
- fetch user requests (customer/provider)

Chat:
- real-time listener using onSnapshot
- tied to requestId
- auto-disable chat when request closed

Rating:
- submit rating after completed request

---

Step 4: Real-time Updates

Use Firestore listeners:
- Requests updates
- Chat messages
- Status changes

No manual refresh logic.

---

Step 5: FCM Notifications (structure)

Prepare:
- device token registration
- save token in users collection
- notification triggers (structure only, no cloud functions yet)

---

Step 6: Data Safety

- Validate all writes
- Prevent invalid request states
- Ensure user can only access their own requests
- Ensure chat is only accessible within request participants

---

STRICT RULES:

- Do NOT change UI
- Do NOT rename routes
- Do NOT restructure navigation
- Do NOT remove existing logic unless replacing mock with Firebase
- Keep everything incremental

---

At the end, provide:

1. Files added/modified
2. Firebase integration summary
3. What is now fully live (Auth, Firestore reads/writes)
4. What still needs backend (Cloud Functions, Payments)
